query: extreme overexposure blown out highlights white sky photograph
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — overexposed/blown highlights, silhouettes against white sky, washed-out high-key minimalism

response.objective_caption: A predominantly white scene showing a pale surface with a thin scattering of darker particles extending from the lower left and a small, irregular darker patch near the right edge.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A severely overexposed photograph dominated by blown-out white tones, where extreme brightness has erased nearly all surface detail and texture. Only a thin trail of darker debris in the lower left and a small irregular patch near the right edge remain visible amid the crushed, blank highlights.
